# Ramoira Documentation

Ramoira is the canonical schema layer for brand identity 
in the agent web.

## Key documents

- [What is a brand schema](concepts/what-is-a-brand-schema.md)
- [CLI reference](reference/cli.md)
- [Schema fields](reference/schema-fields.md)
- [Cursor integration](integrations/cursor.md)
- [Claude Code integration](integrations/claude-code.md)
- [First schema guide](guides/first-schema.md)

## Schema spec

github.com/ramoira/schema-spec/SPEC.md

## Example schema

github.com/ramoira/brand-schema-spec/examples/little-rituals/
